title: McpServer
description: An MCP server that exposes Workato API endpoints as tools for AI agents.

handle.description: Unique slug identifier of the MCP server.

name.description: Display name of the MCP server.

folder_id.description: ID of the folder containing this MCP server.

mcp_url.description: The authenticated MCP URL that AI agents connect to.

authentication_method.description: Authentication method used by this MCP server.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the MCP server was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the MCP server was last updated.
